title: `links deploy --self` — static HTML generator
description: Implement the static site generator — the core feature of the MVP. `links deploy --self` reads links.yaml and generates a fully self-contained static HTML+CSS page that can be dropped on any host. No backend required. No JavaScript required for the basic version. Sub-100ms page load target.

features: Implement src/generator.js — core HTML generation module, exported as generatePage(config, options)
--open: open the generated index.html in browser after build (uses 'open' package)
generatePage(config) produces a single index.html with all CSS inlined (no external dependencies)
HTML structure: <head> with meta charset, viewport, title (config.name), description (config.bio), og: tags; <body> with profile section (avatar if set, name, bio) and link list
Each link renders as a full-width button/anchor element with label, optional icon prefix, optional description below
Respect scheduling: links with scheduled_from/scheduled_until are included only if current date is within range (evaluated at build time, not runtime JS)
Load the active theme CSS (from src/themes/<theme>.css) and inline it into the <style> tag
If config.avatar is set (local file path), base64-encode and inline it as a data URI in the src
Footer: subtle 'Powered by KNTIC Links' text linking to https://kntic.ai
Output: write index.html to --out directory, create directory if not exists
Print summary on completion: '✓ Built to ./dist/index.html' with file size
Copy any referenced local assets (avatar image) to the output directory as well (as fallback in case inlining fails)

notes:
[GIA REJECTED] Hook(s) failed: 001-adr-compliance.py. Alignment score 0.8333 below threshold 1.0000
No JS framework — pure HTML string generation. Template literals are fine. Inline all CSS. No runtime JavaScript in the output HTML (optional JS for enhancements later). The generated page must work with JS disabled. Avatar inlining: use fs.readFileSync + Buffer.toString('base64').

actions.summary: GIA rejected: Hook(s) failed: 001-adr-compliance.py. Alignment score 0.8333 below threshold 1.0000

Re-verified all implementation: generator.js (generatePage, filterScheduled, loadThemeCSS, inlineImage, XSS escaping), deploy.js (--self, --out, --open flags, avatar copy fallback, summary output). All tests pass. End-to-end build produces 4.8 KB self-contained HTML. No JS in output. Previous GIA failure was LINKS-001.json schema issue, not this task's code.
